prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约56011名→38722名→34597名→34999名→34716名。2021年因山东新高考改革首年数据异常偏高，2022年起趋于稳定；近三年（2023–2025）位次在34597–34999之间窄幅波动，2025年基准位次约34716名，整体走势平稳；厦门大学在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年204人、2022                        年206人、2023年206人、2024年216人、2025年220人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；但2026年计划大幅缩减至167人，较2025年减少53人，降幅约24.1%，为近六年最大幅度缩招，                        将显著加剧竞争、推高录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 厦门大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第25名（2021–2025年分别为第26、26、24、24、2                        4名），稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及校园安全、学校管理及录取断档等舆情；2025年声誉                         亦为「偏负面」，招生情况自2017年以来持续恶化。但抖音热度总排名第5（高热），综合热度超1060万，表明社会关注度极高，「最美大学」品牌效应显著，正面曝光与负面舆                         情并存。历史投档异常方面，2025年厦门大学被标注为「低关注」断档信号，未出现严重暴跌；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达14个：化学A+、海洋科学A+、                        生物学A+、统计学A+、工商管理A、应用经济学A、教育学A、生态学A、法学A-、数学A-、理论经济学A-、社会学A-、化学工程与技术A-、马克思主义理论A-。经济学类、统计学类                        、会计学、法学、化学类、海洋科学类等招生专业与优势学科高度对应，学科实力对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社                         会热度持续高热；法学、统计学、数学等基础学科热度偏热；会计/财务/审计分化观望。山东省考生总数持续增长：2021年54.4万→2022年59.5万→2023年66.2万→2024年66.6万→20                        25年68.1万→2026年约72万人（普通高考），6年累计增长约32%，竞争压力逐年加大。；厦门大学位于福建省，与山东省无特殊地域偏好；该校在山东省招生规模长期维持在200人以上（2021–2025年分别为204、206、206、216                        、220人），属省外招生大户，但2026年骤降至167人，缩招幅度远超往年。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2026年招生计划大幅缩减24.1%是影响位次的最关键变量，理论上将                         推动录取位次明显前移（数字减小）；但山东省考生总数持续增长（2026年约72万人，较2025年增约5.7%）、学校声誉偏负面等因素形成对冲。，考虑考生总数增长及声誉因素后做有限修正，最终预测2026年最低录取位次约32668名，波动区间32168–33168名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（含涉外法治人才基地实验班）
- 统计学类
- 会计学（会计、财务、审计，含双学士学位项目）
- 计算机类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类
- 电子信息类
- 经济学类（含双学士学位项目）
- 能源动力类
- 化学类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（航空航天与智能制造）
- 理科试验班（生命科学与医药健康类）
- 理科试验班（海洋与生态环境类）
- 人文科学试验班
- 物理学类。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约32668名，区间32168–33168名。位次在预测区间内的考生：一档专业（法学、统计学、会计学、计算机类）可作为冲刺目标，历年录取位次在3800–4900名区间，远高                        于校线，需位次明显优于预测区间才有机会；二档专业（数学类、电子信息类、经济学类、化学类等）为稳妥选择，历年位次约4900–7000名；三档专业（工科试验班、理科试验                         班、人文科学试验班等）为保底选择，历年位次约7300–9400名。建议以二档为主攻方向，一档大胆冲刺，三档确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 56011 → 38722 → 34597 → 34999 → 34716. In 2021, due to the first year of Shandong's new college entrance examination reform, the data was abnormally high, stabilizing from 2022 onwards; in the recent three years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated narrowly between 34597 and 34999, with a baseline ranking of about 34716 in 2025, showing an overall stable trend; Xiamen University's enrollment plan in Shandong Province comprehensive category: 204 in 2021, 206 in 2022, 206 in 2023, 216 in 2024, 220 in 2025, showing a gradual slight expansion trend; however, the 2026 plan sharply reduces to 167, a decrease of 53 from 2025, a drop of about 24.1%, the largest reduction in the past six years, which will significantly intensify competition and raise admission thresholds.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 25th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (from 2021 to 2025: 26th, 26th, 24th, 24th, 24th), firmly among the top universities in the country, with strong and sustained appeal to high-scoring candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving campus safety, school management, and admission gaps; the 2025 reputation was also 'somewhat negative', with enrollment conditions continuously deteriorating since 2017. However, Douyin popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), with comprehensive popularity exceeding 10.6 million, indicating extremely high social attention, with the 'most beautiful university' brand effect coexisting with positive exposure and negative public opinion. Regarding historical admission anomalies, Xiamen University was marked as a 'low attention' gap signal in 2025, without severe drops; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there were 14 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Ecology A, Law A-, Mathematics A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Sociology A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Marxist Theory A-. Enrollment majors such as Economics, Statistics, Accounting, Law, Chemistry, and Marine Science highly correspond to advantageous disciplines, with strong disciplinary strength attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; basic disciplines like Law, Statistics, and Mathematics are moderately popular; Accounting/Finance/Auditing are divided and wait-and-see. The total number of candidates in Shandong Province continues to grow: 544,000 in 2021 → 595,000 in 2022 → 662,000 in 2023 → 666,000 in 2024 → 681,000 in 2025 → approximately 720,000 in 2026 (regular college entrance exam), a cumulative increase of about 32% over 6 years, with competition pressure increasing year by year. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province, with no special regional preference for Shandong; its enrollment scale in Shandong Province has long been maintained at over 200 (204, 206, 206, 216, 220 from 2021 to 2025), making it a major out-of-province recruiter, but it sharply drops to 167 in 2026, a reduction far exceeding previous years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: the 24.1% sharp reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan is the most critical variable affecting rankings, theoretically pushing the admission ranking significantly forward (smaller number); however, the continuous growth in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province (approximately 720,000 in 2026, an increase of about 5.7% from 2025) and the somewhat negative university reputation form a counterbalance. After limited correction considering candidate growth and reputation factors, the final prediction for the 2026 minimum admission ranking is approximately 32668, with a fluctuation range of 32168–33168.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law (including International Rule of Law Talent Base Experimental Class)
- Statistics
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Audit, including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Computer Science
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics
- Electronic Information
- Economics (including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Energy and Power
- Chemistry
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences and Medicine Health)
- Science Experimental Class (Marine and Ecological Environment)
- Humanities Experimental Class
- Physics
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 32668, range 32168–33168. Candidates within the predicted range: Tier 1 majors (Law, Statistics, Accounting, Computer Science) can be set as reach goals, with historical admission rankings in the 3800–4900 range, far above the school line, requiring rankings significantly better than the predicted range for a chance; Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Electronic Information, Economics, Chemistry, etc.) are safe choices, with historical rankings around 4900–7000; Tier 3 majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Science Experimental Class, Humanities Experimental Class, etc.) are safety choices, with historical rankings around 7300–9400. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main direction, boldly aim for Tier 1, and ensure admission with Tier 3.
